message:
fix: detect polecat with closed bead still running in witness patrol (gt-h1l6i)

Add closed-bead detection to DetectZombiePolecats: when a polecat tmux
session is alive and the agent is alive, but the hooked bead has been closed,
the polecat is occupying a slot without doing work. The witness now detects
this condition and nukes the idle polecat.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
